stderr | src/components/billing/__tests__/payment-methods.supplementary.test.tsx > PaymentMethods > Set Default Action > triggers success toast on successful set default
An update to PaymentMethods inside a test was not wrapped in act(...).

When testing, code that causes React state updates should be wrapped into act(...):

act(() => {
  /* fire events that update state */
});
